code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    emit_prefix_sums(line)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

fn emit_prefix_sums(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut neg = false
  mut total = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == 32 or v == 9 or v == 13
        if has_digit
          let val = if neg
            0 - cur
          else
            cur
          end
          total = total + val
          if first
            out = "#{total}"
            first = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{total}"
          end
          cur = 0
          has_digit = false
          neg = false
        end
      else if v == 45
        neg = true
      else if v == 43
        neg = false
      else
        cur = cur * 10 + (v - 48)
        has_digit = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    let val = if neg
      0 - cur
    else
      cur
    end
    total = total + val
    if first
      out = "#{total}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{total}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
